data.name: Agent Skills
data.summary: Reusable agent skills, per-repo starters, and a self-hosted MCP runtime (Serena/Graphify/Omnigraph/Superpowers/Playwright).

data.title: Omnigraph replaces Mem0 as default memory
data.rationale: Typed, queryable, reviewable memory keeps rules/decisions integrated; Mem0 auto-extracts opaque vector blobs. Mem0 kept as off-by-default fallback profile.

data.title: Herdr is the recommended agent multiplexer over raw tmux
data.rationale: Per-agent status, detach/reattach over SSH, socket API for agent-to-agent orchestration. antigravity-remote-ui kept for the distinct IDE-streaming case.

data.title: Repo restructured into skills/ starters/ infra/
data.rationale: Consolidated loose dirs (Gen/prompt/repositories -> prompts/), moved mcp-servers + antigravity under infra/, untracked graphify-out, de-personalized paths.

data.statement: A skill's SKILL.md is the single source of truth; starters and root instruction files are thin pointers, never copies of the workflow.
No personal absolute paths or secrets in tracked files; use ${AGENT_SKILLS_ROOT}/${CODE_ROOT}/${SERENA_HOME} and gitignored .env.

data.name: Backtracking via CHANGELOG + ADRs
data.example: Record notable changes in CHANGELOG.md and non-obvious decisions as docs/decisions/NNNN-*.md; small revertible commits.

data.statement: Prefer Serena/Graphify/Omnigraph over brute-force file reads.
Write a failing test before implementation; red-green-refactor.
